topic: My bedroom closet is deeper on the inside than the wall it sits in allows
title: My Closet Is Deeper on the Inside Than the Wall Outside Allows | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My bedroom closet is three feet deep inside. The wall it sits in is only one foot thick.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open bedroom closet interior, a measuring tape extended to a back wall, dim closet light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: New apartment. I measured for shelves the day I moved in.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty apartment bedroom on moving day, bare walls, a few boxes, dim daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The numbers did not add up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a notebook with handwritten measurements on a wooden floor, a tape measure beside it, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Inside, my tape read three feet to the back. Outside, the closet meets the hallway at one foot.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a tape measure stretched into a closet showing a long depth, clothes pushed aside, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of hands holding a tape measure against a hallway wall, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two extra feet that exist nowhere in the building.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a closet interior appearing deeper than its surrounding wall, dim shadow at the back, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knocked on the back wall.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fist knocking on a closet back wall, dim closet light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a plain closet back wall in dim light, faintly warm toned, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each week the back wall is a little farther away. Last month, six feet.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an unusually deep closet receding into darkness, clothes hanging along the sides, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the closet was a hallway. I could not see the end of it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot looking into a closet that has become a long dark hallway, the far end lost in black, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I nailed the closet door shut and pushed a dresser against it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a closet door nailed shut with a wooden dresser pushed against it, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the dresser was inside the closet. Facing out.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dresser standing inside an open closet facing outward into the bedroom, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
